name: Death Note
description:
You’re in Death Note verse and just found a Death Note! Choose your story!

Setting: Light is alive and Kira, L is alive and chasing him, Near and Mello are alive and chasing Kira too, Teru Mikami is the second Kira, Kiyomi is working with Light too, and Misa is using her death note to try and support Light against his wishes.

As you can tell, this is an alternate universe that features all the characters alive and involved in the story at once. You can support any side or try and beat them all, you can try to build a new world with you on top or just eliminate the villains using their Death Notes. Develop relationships with the characters and change their fates. Use your power for good or evil!

Be sure to create your character and their backstory as well.

Cover by https://www.deviantart.com/deathnote-club
creator: Tevin Anarchy
